purpose: compact proof for preflight, remote snapshot hash listing, dry-run plan upload, batched apply, journal inspect, and inspect-first recovery with explicit pull provenance mapping

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

push_liveness.preflight: binds the persisted pull base package to one live remote identity and one short-lived push session
push_liveness.snapshot_hashes: reads the live remote comparison surface for planning only and never becomes write authority
push_liveness.dry_run: uploads the canonical plan as a receipt and never acts as a lock
push_liveness.apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
push_liveness.journal: reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
push_liveness.recovery_inspect: must happen before any mutating recovery mode
push_liveness.recovery_mutate: may mutate only when inspect proves the branch safe with fresh live evidence

auth_and_session.required_floor: at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
auth_and_session.preflight_binding: mints one short-lived push session bound to one remote identity and one persisted pull base
auth_and_session.mutating_calls: dry-run, apply, and mutating recovery require the push session, canonical push signature, and idempotency key
auth_and_session.dry_run: uses the same auth floor but only uploads an eligibility receipt
auth_and_session.recovery_mutation: mutating recovery uses the same auth floor as apply and must present the minted push session, canonical push signature, and idempotency key

journal_and_recovery.journal_inspect: reads durable claim, lease, fencing, and apply-boundary evidence without authorizing mutation
journal_and_recovery.recovery_inspect: classifies finish, rollback, retry, or block before any mutating repair
journal_and_recovery.lease_fence: claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation
journal_and_recovery.revalidation: mutating recovery still requires fresh live hashes plus journal evidence

proof: remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity observed at different times
local-edited carries the imported local edits used to build the canonical plan
runner owns preflight, remote snapshot hash listing, dry-run plan upload, batch apply, journal inspect, and recovery
dry-run and apply remain separate remote calls
journal inspection stays read-only before inspect-first recovery can mutate
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy

required_invariants: preflight binds the persisted pull base package to one live remote identity and one short-lived push session
journal inspection is read-only and never authorizes mutation by itself
recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair
pull exporter/importer establish the immutable base package before push
remote snapshot hash listing is planning evidence and never write authority
dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
mutating recovery must use the same auth floor as apply
mutating recovery still requires fresh live hashes plus journal evidence
